source_pr.title: fix: time add parameter
source_pr.body:
https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/3304#issuecomment-302989928

I think it's better to change
func (t *Time) Add(d *Duration) Duration
to
func (t *Time) Add(d Duration) Duration

As you see, Duration is used everywhere.
The return value of Add is Duration,
Method is defined on Duration rather than *Duration
Datum in datum.go also use Duration ...

func (t *Time) Add(d *Duration) Duration must be a mistake!

@tiancaiamao
